title: cota monantha
intro: Cota monantha, also known as the Cota daisy or annual Cota, is an annual plant belonging to the daisy family, characterized by its daisy-like flowers and slender stems. Traditionally, Cota monantha has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and acting as an antiseptic to prevent infections. In herbal preparations, Cota monantha is often dried and made into teas, infusions, or used in topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
